commands: set -eu; bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run build:vinext; mkdir -p .next/standalone/public .next/standalone/.next; cp -r public/. .next/standalone/public/; cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static; rm -f .next/standalone/.env .next/standalone/local.db; rm -rf railpack-bundle; mkdir -p railpack-bundle; cp -R .next/standalone/. railpack-bundle/

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f railpack-bundle/server.js ]; then exec bun railpack-bundle/server.js; elif [ -f .next/standalone/server.js ]; then exec bun .next/standalone/server.js; elif [ -f server.js ]; then exec bun server.js; else echo 'server.js not found in deploy artifact' >&2; find . -maxdepth 5 -name server.js -print >&2; exit 1; fi
